title: Longer Potion Levels
description: LongerPotionLevels is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that changes Speed II and Strength II potions (drinkable + splash) to last 8 minutes, with corrected potion lore so players see the proper duration.
body:
# LongerPotionLevels

Tired of weak Level II potion durations?

LongerPotionLevels upgrades your brewing experience by making Speed II and Strength II potions last a full 8:00.

This plugin is designed for PvP, SMP, and competitive gameplay where stronger potions should still feel worth brewing.

## What it changes?

Speed II brewed in a Brewing Stand -> 8:00

Strength II brewed in a Brewing Stand -> 8:00

Works for both:

- Drinkable potions
- Splash potions
- Potion tooltip/lore is updated to show the correct 8:00 duration

### Why use it?

- Makes high-tier potions more useful in real fights
- Keeps gameplay simple (no commands needed)
- Lightweight and focused: only modifies Speed II and Strength II

Compatibility

Built for modern Spigot/Paper versions (1.21 API)

Visit Plugin Hub: https://discord.gg/FzD9b5nH27

Rogue Industry
